feed.title: realufo.org — UK · National Archives
feed.subtitle: Latest declassified records mirrored from UK · National Archives.
feed.rights: Per-source jurisdiction (US 17 U.S.C. §105, UK OGL v3, France Loi 78-753, Brazil LAI 12.527, Chile 20.285, etc.)

entry.title: Final Tranche of UFO Files Released — Press Release
entry.summary: TNA's press release accompanying the final tranche (24 files, 6,000+ pages spanning 1994–2000) — closing the MoD's 50-year UFO investigation programme.

entry.title: Final Tranche of UFO Files Released — Press Release (2013)
entry.summary: TNA press release accompanying the final tranche (24 files, 6,000+ pages spanning 1994–2000) — closing the MoD's 50-year UFO investigation programme.
